bundle.shortDescription: Federated, local-first torrent discovery and chat.
bundle.longDescription: TorrentsTrackers is a desktop client that aggregates community-curated torrent catalogs from any backend (local folder, HTTP/raw URL, Git repository) and lets you discover, filter and launch magnets in your existing torrent client. Includes a built-in WebSocket chat for connecting to community-hosted servers, signed end-to-end with ed25519. No website, no domain, no central index.
